flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Lafayette College rose 22% between 2006 and 2009 ($31.7k → $38.5k).

flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Lafayette College rose 15% between 2021 and 2024 ($57.1k → $65.4k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Lafayette College fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (1.1% → 0.0%).

flags.label: Private nonprofit bachelor's-predominant peer
flags.summary: 10-year earnings at Lafayette College are 55% above the private nonprofit bachelor's-predominant peer median ($91.4k vs $59.0k).
